title: Directed Graphs, Strong Components, and Condensation · Data-Structure Studio
summary: Analyze circular dependencies and group mutually reachable services. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a strongly-connected dependency report while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use discovery and finish structure to reason about directed reachability.
Compute strongly connected components and validate mutual reachability within each result.
Collapse strong components into an acyclic condensation graph.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
